headline: 3 Utility Stocks That’ll Pay Your Bills For Years
summary: Earned income requires trading hours for pay. Passive income arrives on schedule whether markets are open or closed, whether you’re working or sleeping. For investors building a paycheck without a timesheet, dividend stocks remain the cleanest path to that goal. Utilities sit at the conservative end of the passive income spectrum.
